known_divergence: The subagent runs and its file effect matches, but hare's parent engine does not isolate it: the parent's usage total includes the subagent's turns (190 vs the reference's 160, which counts only the parent's own two turns), the parent takes no follow-up turn after Task returns, and the parent's result is the subagent's last text instead of its own. Needs subagent/parent state isolation in QueryEngine; the golden already records the reference behavior.
